title: Outlier Detection — outliers
text: Outlier Detection

title: Outlier Detection — outliers
code: find_outliers(object, ...)  count_outliers(object)  plot_outliers(object, data, ...)  # S4 method for CompositionMatrix find_outliers(object, level = 0.975, robust = TRUE, alpha = 0.5)  # S4 method for OutlierIndex count_outliers(object)  # S4 method for OutlierIndex,missing plot_outliers(object)  # S4 method for OutlierIndex,CompositionMatrix plot_outliers(object, data, select = NULL)

title: Outlier Detection — outliers
text: object OutlierIndex object. ... Currently used. data CompositionMatrix object. level length-one numeric vector giving significance level. level used cut-value outlier detection: observations larger (squared) Mahalanobis distance considered potential outliers. robust logical scalar: robust estimators used (see robustbase::covMcd())? alpha length-one numeric vector controlling size subsets determinant minimized (see robustbase::covMcd()). used robust TRUE. select numeric character vector giving selection parts drawn.

title: Outlier Detection — outliers
text: find_outliers() returns OutlierIndex object.

title: Outlier Detection — outliers
text: Filzmoser, P., Garrett, R. G. & Reimann, C. (2005). Multivariate outlier detection exploration geochemistry. Computers & Geosciences, 31(5), 579-587. doi: 10.1016/j.cageo.2004.11.013 . Filzmoser, P. & Hron, K. (2008). Outlier Detection Compositional Data Using Robust Methods. Mathematical Geosciences, 40(3), 233-248. doi: 10.1007/s11004-007-9141-5 . Filzmoser, P., Hron, K. & Reimann, C. (2012). Interpretation multivariate outliers compositional data. Computers & Geosciences, 39, 77-85. doi: 10.1016/j.cageo.2011.06.014 . Santos, F. (2020). Modern methods old data: overview robust methods outliers detection applications osteology. Journal Archaeological Science: Reports, 32, 102423. doi: 10.1016/j.jasrep.2020.102423 .

title: Outlier Detection — outliers
text: N. Frerebeau

title: Outlier Detection — outliers
code: ## Coerce to chemical data data("kommos", package = "folio") coda <- as_composition(kommos[, -c(1, 2)]) coda <- remove_NA(coda, margin = 1) #> 6 rows were removed: #> * 98/42 (n=1) #> * 98/45 (n=1) #> * 98/49 (n=2) #> * 98/50 (n=1) #> * 98/71 (n=1) #> * 98/81 (n=1)  ## Detect outliers out <- find_outliers(coda) count_outliers(out) #> [1] 30  ## Plot plot_outliers(out) +   ggplot2::theme_bw() +   khroma::scale_colour_contrast() #> Warning: 'khroma::scale_colour_contrast' is deprecated. #> Use 'scale_colour_highcontrast()' instead. #> See help("Deprecated")   plot_outliers(out, coda, select = 1:6) +   khroma::scale_colour_YlOrBr(range = c(0.3, 1))

title: Data Transformation — transform
code: transform_clr(object, ...)  transform_alr(object, ...)  transform_ilr(object, ...)  transform_pivot(object, ...)  # S4 method for CompositionMatrix transform_clr(object, base = exp(1))  # S4 method for CompositionMatrix transform_alr(object, j = ncol(object), base = exp(1))  # S4 method for CompositionMatrix transform_ilr(object, base = exp(1))  # S4 method for CompositionMatrix transform_pivot(object, pivot = 1, base = exp(1))

title: Data Transformation — transform
text: object CompositionMatrix object. ... Currently used. base positive numeric value giving base respect logarithms computed. Change know . j integer giving index rationing part. pivot integer giving index pivotal variable.

text: LogRatio object.

title: Data Transformation — transform
text: Aitchison, J. (1986). Statistical Analysis Compositional Data. London: Chapman Hall. doi: 10.1007/978-94-009-4109-0 . Egozcue, J. J., Pawlowsky-Glahn, V., Mateu-Figueras, G. & Barceló-Vidal, C. (2003). Isometric Logratio Transformations Compositional Data Analysis. Mathematical Geology, 35(3), 279-300. doi: 10.1023/:1023818214614 . Fišerová, E. & Hron, K. (2011). Interpretation Orthonormal Coordinates Compositional Data. Mathematical Geosciences, 43(4), 455‑468. doi: 10.1007/s11004-011-9333-x .

title: Data Transformation — transform
text: N. Frerebeau

title: Data Transformation — transform
code: ## Coerce to chemical data data("kommos", package = "folio") coda <- as_composition(kommos[, -c(1, 2)]) coda <- remove_NA(coda, margin = 1) #> 6 rows were removed: #> * 98/42 (n=1) #> * 98/45 (n=1) #> * 98/49 (n=2) #> * 98/50 (n=1) #> * 98/71 (n=1) #> * 98/81 (n=1)  ## Centered log-ratio clr <- transform_clr(coda)  ## Additive log-ratio alr <- transform_alr(coda, j = "Ca")  ## Isometric log-ratio ilr1 <- transform_ilr(coda) ilr2 <- transform_pivot(coda)
